title: MMF Module Schema
description: Modular Mission Framework intermediate JSON schema. Contract between the GUI (frontend) and the MMF Compiler (backend). Version 2.0 — Post-FMEA, supports group and mission output modes.

mmf_version.description: Schema version. Compiler and GUI must agree on this value.

output_mode.description: Output format. 'group' emits a .Group file per module (current). 'mission' emits a complete .Mission file via the orchestrator (future).

compiler_options.description: Global compiler configuration. Applies to all modules in this payload.

id_counter_start.description: Starting ID for the monotonic counter. If null, compiler initializes from max(existing Index in target file) + 1. If set, overrides auto-detection. [FMEA PI-003]

initialization_delay_seconds.description: Master Core initialization delay in seconds. Compiler warns if > 200 deactivated entities and delay < 5s. [FMEA EC-001]

session_duration_minutes.description: Planned mission session length. Used for wave_count validation: wave_count >= ceil(session_duration / avg_sortie_duration). [FMEA EL-001]

target_mission_file.description: Path to existing .Mission file for ID counter initialization. If null, counter starts from id_counter_start or defaults to 1.

mission_properties.description: Mission-level properties. Required when output_mode is 'mission'. Null for 'group' mode. Populated by the orchestrator (future).

map.description: Map identifier matching the geographic database key (e.g., 'stalingrad_winter', 'kuban', 'rhineland').

date.description: Mission date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Affects sunrise/sunset timing.

time.description: Mission start time in HH:MM:SS format (24-hour).

weather_preset.description: Weather configuration identifier from the weather presets database.

player_spawns.description: Player airfield/spawn configurations. Orchestrator populates from geographic database.

airfield_id.description: Airfield identifier from the geographic database.

plane_set.description: List of aircraft type identifiers available at this spawn.

modules.description: Array of module definitions. In 'group' mode, typically one module. In 'mission' mode, the orchestrator populates multiple modules.

module.description: A single MMF module definition. Each module compiles to one .Group block.

module_id.description: Unique identifier for this module within the payload. Used for cross-module [OUT]->[IN] wiring.

module_type.description: Module type. Determines which compiler primitives are composed and which GUI form is displayed.

coalition.description: Which side this module's AI units belong to.

flight.description: Aircraft configuration for this module's AI flights.

magazine.description: Magazine Array configuration: wave count, activation pattern, GC settings.

waypoints.description: Waypoint chain configuration. Required for all module types except ambient_patrol.

attack.description: Attack behavior configuration. Required for module types that engage targets.

scramble.description: Scramble-specific configuration. Required only for module_type 'scramble'.

escort.description: Escort-specific configuration. Required only for module_type 'bomber_escort'.

proxy_coordinates.description: X/Z coordinates where [IN] and [OUT] proxy nodes appear in the BOSEditor workspace.

wiring.description: Cross-module I/O wiring. In 'group' mode, may be null (user wires manually in editor). In 'mission' mode, orchestrator populates this.

aircraft_type.description: IL-2 aircraft type identifier (e.g., 'bf109g6', 'p51d15', 'il2m42'). Must match a valid entry in the type catalog.

ai_skill.description: AI skill level. Maps to the IL-2 AI property value.

country.description: Country identifier (e.g., 'Germany', 'Russia', 'USA', 'Britain'). Must match IL-2 country values.

flight_size.description: Number of aircraft per flight (1 leader + N-1 wingmen). All wingmen Target Linked to leader.

payload_id.description: Payload configuration index. 0 = default loadout. Specific values depend on aircraft type.

fuel.description: Fuel state as a fraction of maximum capacity. 0.1 = 10%, 1.0 = 100%.

skin.description: Custom skin filename. Null uses default skin.

starting_location.description: Initial aircraft state. 'parked' and 'on_runway' require airfield coordinates.

spawn_altitude.description: Spawn altitude in meters. Only used when starting_location is 'in_air'.

magazine_config.description: Magazine Array configuration. Controls wave cycling and garbage collection. [FMEA EL-001, EC-003, EC-004, SM-004]

wave_count.description: Number of pre-built deactivated flights in the Magazine. Compiler validates: wave_count >= ceil(session_duration / time_on_station). Magazine is a single-use sequential dispenser. [FMEA EL-001]

time_on_station_minutes.description: Time-on-Station in minutes before RTB/despawn triggers. Used for session sizing validation and ToS timer generation.

gc_despawn_delay_seconds.description: Delay in seconds after leader OnKilled before ForceComplete+Despawn fires on wingmen. Allows wingmen to complete immediate engagement before cleanup. [FMEA SM-002]

loop.description: If true, last waypoint triggers first waypoint (CAP patrol loop). If false, linear route (intercept, ground attack).

priority.description: Waypoint priority. Low: fighters may break off to attack. Medium: defend only. High: no deviation.

x.description: X coordinate in IL-2 world space.

z.description: Z coordinate in IL-2 world space.

speed.description: Target speed in km/h at this waypoint.

attack_config.description: Attack behavior. Determines AttackArea MCU parameters.

attack_type.description: Target type filter for the AttackArea MCU.

attack_area_radius.description: Radius of the attack area in meters.

attack_coordinates.description: Center of the attack area. If null, defaults to the midpoint of the waypoint chain.

scramble_config.description: Scramble module configuration. Aircraft start parked, taxi, takeoff, then execute mission logic after clearing altitude gate.

airfield_id.description: Airfield identifier from the geographic database. Determines taxi path and runway.

airfield_coordinates.description: Airfield X/Z coordinates. Used if airfield_id is not in the geographic database.

altitude_gate.description: Altitude in meters the flight must reach before airborne logic activates. [Spec Section 6.2]

escort_config.description: Bomber Escort configuration. Defines Cover/Attack toggle behavior. Requires new compiler primitive: emit_cover_attack_toggle().

escorted_module_id.description: module_id of the bomber/transport module this escort is tethered to.

threat_engagement_radius.description: Radius in meters within which the escort breaks cover to engage threats.

return_to_cover_radius.description: Radius beyond which the escort returns to cover formation. Must be > threat_engagement_radius to prevent rapid toggling.

wiring_config.description: Cross-module I/O connections. Null in 'group' mode (user wires manually). Populated by the orchestrator in 'mission' mode.

in_activate_source.description: module_id whose [OUT] triggers this module's [IN]_Activate. Null = activated by Master Core.

out_success_target.description: module_id whose [IN]_Activate is triggered by this module's [OUT]_Success. Null = stub generated. [FMEA EC-002]

out_fail_target.description: module_id whose [IN]_Activate is triggered by this module's [OUT]_Fail. Null = stub generated. [FMEA EC-002]

x.description: X coordinate in IL-2 world space.

z.description: Z coordinate in IL-2 world space.
